posts.raw_content: Please figure out what to do about all these anti Israel bots. This site is for positive high energy pro Trump discussion. At the same time we can criticize Trump too but what has been going on here is not organic. I’m no fan of Israel either but it’s clear that there is something else other than organic discussion going on here. Ive been around since the Donald reddit days and it is so obvious this place is being attacked by anti American groups. Every fucking post has stormfag trash comments.
